notes: I'm surprised this finally runs, and with good fps, too. Unfortunately, it often crashes. I will test some settings and tweaks and post them here if I find a stable setting.
title: Tom Clancy’s The Division™

notes: Game will crash every 20 minutes if you turn on or leave on Uplay overlay for the game. To turn off go into Uplay settings and un check overlay. Once you do that the game will run as it should. No issues once this was done. No tweaks or extra software needed. This is a straight Steam install.
title: Tom Clancy’s The Division™

notes: Just need to disable Uplay overlay for avoiding crashing.
title: Tom Clancy’s The Division™

notes: I have to claim Borked due to unresolvable conflicts with uplay and steam. I forced use of latest version of proton, disabled Uplay overlay, and still get a wine overlay with a little red check box. once I close that box, the game attempts to load and crashes at each instance before the game becomes playable. On windows I can play out of the box, 60 fps on medium settings running 1600x900 resolution with no issues. These settings are unattainable on my system so I am calling it Borked until an update resolves the issues.
title: Tom Clancy’s The Division™
